message:
test: add conformance fixtures for BITFIELD_RO, CONFIG SET/GET, and OBJECT

core_bitmap.json:
- Add 9 BITFIELD_RO test cases: basic GET, reject SET, reject INCRBY,
  multi-GET across two offsets, nonexistent key, and signed-type
  round-trip (i8 with -50)

core_config.json:
- Add 19 CONFIG SET/GET round-trip tests: maxmemory-policy, loglevel,
  timeout, tcp-keepalive, notify-keyspace-events, active-defrag-enabled,
  multi-parameter SET (bind + protected-mode), unknown parameter error,
  value overwrite, CONFIG RESETSTAT, CONFIG REWRITE, and unknown
  subcommand error

core_object.json (new fixture, 227 lines):
- OBJECT ENCODING: string int/embstr/raw, hash listpack, list listpack,
  set intset/listpack, sorted-set listpack, stream, missing key error
- OBJECT IDLETIME: 5-second idle measurement, missing key error
- OBJECT REFCOUNT: returns 1, missing key error
- OBJECT FREQ: returns 0, missing key error
- OBJECT HELP: returns the 6-line help array
- Error cases: unknown subcommand, no subcommand, ENCODING without key

smoke.rs:
- Register core_object_conformance test function

core_connection.json / core_server.json:
- Bump DBSIZE command count from 230 to 231 to account for the new
  BITFIELD_RO entry in COMMAND_TABLE

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
